subject: [PATCH v4] mm/mempolicy: track user-defined mempolicy allocations

reviews.author: Andrew Morton
reviews.summary: Reviewer Andrew Morton noted that the patch does not handle the case where a user-defined policy is set but has no allocations, and requested that the counters be initialized to zero in this case.

2026-04-27.patch_summary: This patch adds new counters to track user-defined memory policy allocations, specifically for intentional and fallback allocations on NUMA nodes. The counters are exposed per-node in nodeN/vmstat and globally in /proc/vmstat, providing information needed to investigate pressure on a NUMA node. The counters distinguish between user-specified policies and system default policies, allowing for more accurate analysis of memory allocation patterns.
